title: Statistics
description: Analyze your menus, most used dishes and planning habits.
emptyDescription: Plan a few meals or choose a range with history to see useful trends.
noItems: Not enough data in this range.
insightPlanning: You planned {planned} out of {total} possible meals in the selected range.
insightVariety: The most repeated dish is {dish}, with {count} appearances.
insightEmpty: There are not enough planned meals to detect patterns yet.
errorOffline: Statistics could not be loaded. Check your connection or try again.
